description_cn:
调整其刚度以保持恒定力的元素。

使连接的直线拉力达到平衡状态。
description_en:
An element which adapts its stiffness to maintain a constant force。

This brings the linear tension in the connection to a balanced state.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 强度——拉伸强度为正，压缩强度为负。
parameters.desc_en: Strength - positive for tension, negative for compression

author: Kangaroo Team
